Subject: Financing disclosure and PDPA safeguards — Siam Meridian Logistics Public Company Limited (SET-listed)
This note summarises SEC Thailand compliance for the revolving credit facility with Eastern Archipelago Bank plc (Labuan Branch) and clarifies what is public vs MNPI under the SEA.
The facility headline terms were published on the SET News Portal on 18 April 2026 and referenced in the Company’s 56-1 One Report; therefore, pricing bands, tenor, and security package descriptors are already in the public domain.
No unpublished financial forecasts, dividend proposals, or board resolutions are included herein, and this memo avoids SEA insider information issues; routine drawdown notices will be posted via the SET system.
Cross-border elements (foreign law–governed facility agreement; Thai law share pledge over subsidiary Logistics Node Co., Ltd.) have been cleared by external counsel and are referenced only in the public summary.
Employment & PDPA: HR will circulate updated consent notices compliant with PDPA B.E. 2562; the template contains generic fields (Name, Date of Birth, ID/Passport No., Address) but teams must not collect passport scans for casual contractors.
Generic demographic descriptions (e.g., a mid-career warehouse supervisor in the central region) may be used in training materials and do not, by themselves, identify any person.
For the incident review last quarter, the procurement analyst (DOB 1990-08-14), based in Pathum Thani Province, using company handset device tag SM-PT-4421 and login alias “proc.ops44”, accessed the vendor portal via home network 10.34.55.12; payroll wallet ref EPAY-7782 and internal staff code E-009122 were recorded.
These system artefacts were logged for security purposes only and are to be purged after 90 days per our retention schedule; no national ID or passport numbers were captured.
Elsewhere in this file, placeholders such as “ID No.: ________” or “Customer Ref: XXX-XXX” appear in draft forms; these blanks are not personal data until completed.
All email contacts for this workstream are role mailboxes (e.g., compliance@siammeridian.example, treasury@eab-labuan.example) and may remain in disclosures where needed.
Supplier onboarding in the Mekong Frontier Capital hedging programme uses generic device categories only (e.g., “Android phone”, “Windows laptop”) and rejects device serials in forms.
We will include only the publicly announced financing narrative in the next SET current report and exclude any staff details or IP addresses from exhibits.
The internal securities trading blackout calendar is policy-level guidance and contains no issuer performance data; it may be shared with auditors without creating MNPI concerns.
Note: the term “insider list” herein refers to a template for future use; entries currently show only role titles and departments, with no names or personal contact det
